title: Verify user can filter to only active todos

steps.action: Navigate to the TodoMVC application with a mix of completed and active todos
steps.expected: The todo list shows both active and completed todos

steps.action: Click the Active filter link in the footer
steps.expected: The Active filter is selected and only active todos remain visible

steps.action: Verify completed todos are hidden from the list
steps.expected: No completed todos appear in the visible list

preconditions.action: Enter a sample todo in the new-todo input field

preconditions.expected: The todo appears in the list, rendering the footer with filter links
